name: Lettuce Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the lettuce and separate the leaves.
2. Allow the leaves to drain.
3. In a bowl, combine the remaining ingredients: olive oil, white vinegar, salt, black pepper, basil, and chopped garlic.
4. Gently toss the lettuce leaves in the dressing until they are evenly coated.
Jack Santa Maria, Greek Vegetarian Cookery
